name: Sandman Pixel Race 3D
description: Sandman Pixel Race 3D: Imposter Pixel 3d Man Run Game is a satisfying and entertaining running game, you will enjoy collecting the color boxes in order to use them to get shortcuts to win the race. Become the sand rush master among your friends and enjoy the Imposter run game. Stack the different colors and reach the finish line of the game. Beware of the obstacles facing you during this fun race 3d game. The race line is tricky! Are you ready to win the rush game?
instructions: Collect the color boxes as much as you can Use these boxes to get shortcuts Control where to put the boxes
tags: 3D, Arcade, Color, Coloring, Game, Hypercasual, Online, Pixel, Race, run, running, Stickman
